name: Dried Winds
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>渇</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かわ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>きの<ruby lang="jp"><rb>風</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かぜ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: If you gain LP: Target 1 face-up monster your opponent controls; destroy it. If you control an "Aroma" monster and your LP are at least 3000 higher than your opponent's: You can pay LP equal to the difference; destroy face-up monsters your opponent controls whose combined ATK is less than or equal to the LP you paid to activate this effect. You can only use each effect of "Dried Winds" once per turn.
eff: If you gain LP: Target 1 face-up monster your opponent controls; destroy it. If you control an "Aroma" monster and your LP are at least 3000 higher than your opponent's: You can pay LP equal to the difference; destroy face-up monsters your opponent controls whose combined ATK is less than or equal to the LP you paid to activate this effect. You can only use each effect of "Dried Winds" once per turn.

action: Activates if you gain Life Points
mst: Destroys your opponent's face-up Monster Cards
